title: Vehicle licensing statistics: January to March 2025
body: " Our statistical practice is regulated by the Office for Statistics Regulation (OSR). OSR sets the standards of trustworthiness, quality and value in the Code of Practice for Statistics that all producers of official statistics should adhere to. You are welcome to contact us directly by emailing us with any comments about how we meet these standards.   Comparing 2025 Quarter 1 (January to March) with 2024 Quarter 1 (January to March), in the UK there were:   732,000 vehicles registered for the first time, an increase of 2% 129,000 vehicles registered for the first time that were zero emission, an increase of 41%   At the end of March 2025, in the UK, there were:   41.9 million licensed vehicles 1,517,000 licensed zero emission vehicles   Contact us   Vehicles statistics     Email vehicles.stats@dft.gov.uk         To hear more about the Department for Transport’s statistical publications as they are released, follow us on X at DfTstats. "

taxons.title: Vehicle registration, log books and number plates
